description: Send notifications to your own DingTalk destination through the UnitySVC gateway. POST the unified message envelope {title, body, type, format}; the gateway composes an Apprise dingtalk:// URL from your stored secrets and delivers via apprise.unitysvc.dev. The free apprise channel uses your own stored credentials; the apprise-plus channel binds extra per-enrollment destinations via parameters. The gateway / gateway-plus transformer channels instead POST a native DingTalk robot webhook payload directly to oapi.dingtalk.com, bypassing Apprise.
name: msg-to-dingtalk

request.template: {"urls":"dingtalk://${ customer_secrets.{{ params.token_secret }} }/","title":{* _escape_json(_body.title or "") *},"body":{* _escape_json(_body.body or "") *},"type":{* _escape_json(_body.type or "info") *},"format":{* _escape_json(_body.format or "text") *}}

{"msgtype":"text","text":{"content":{* _escape_json((_body.title or "")..((_body.title or "")~="" and (_body.body or "")~="" and "\n" or "")..(_body.body or "")) *}},"at":{"atMobiles":[],"isAtAll":false}}

{"msgtype":"text","text":{"content":{* _escape_json((_body.title or "")..((_body.title or "")~="" and (_body.body or "")~="" and "\n" or "")..(_body.body or "")) *}},"at":{"atMobiles":[],"isAtAll":false}}
